scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w services/api && npm run build -w services/scanner && npm run build -w services/scheduler && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @pluginscore/core && npm run build -w @pluginscore/scoring && npm run build -w @pluginscore/wporg
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck -w @pluginscore/core && npm run typecheck -w @pluginscore/scoring && npm run typecheck -w @pluginscore/wporg && npm run typecheck -w services/api && npm run typecheck -w services/scanner && npm run typecheck -w services/scheduler
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w apps/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w services/api
scripts.scanner:seed: npm run build:packages && npm run seed -w services/scanner
scripts.scanner:once: npm run build:packages && npm run scan:once -w services/scanner
scripts.scheduler:once: npm run build:packages && npm run sync:once -w services/scheduler
scripts.scheduler:work: npm run build:packages && npm run work -w services/scheduler
